title: Echioglossum simondii
intro: Echioglossum simondii, also known as the French lobelia or Lobelia simondii, is a plant species belonging to the family Campanulaceae. Traditionally, Echioglossum simondii has been used in herbal medicine for its purported health benefits, including the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. The plant contains bioactive constituents, including alkaloids, glycosides, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal effects. Echioglossum simondii is commonly used in herbal preparations, including tinctures, infusions, and dried extracts, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic properties.
